classifications.phrase: The economic recovery in Australia is stronger than earlier expected
Progress in reducing unemployment has been faster than expected
inflation and wage pressures are subdued
a pick-up in inflation and wages growth is expected, it is likely to be only…
It will not increase the cash rate until actual inflation is sustainably within the 2…
This is unlikely to be until 2024 at the earliest

payload.rationale: The RBA signals a dovish stance by emphasizing subdued inflation and wage pressures, expecting only gradual pick-up, and committing not to raise rates until 2024 at earliest, despite acknowledging stronger-than-expected growth and employment progress.
